name: pr_alc_tms_ret
drl:
rule "R0"
salience 10
agenda-group "gb"
when
    T0(f1 == true)
then
end
rule "R4"
when
    $p : T0($b : f1, $t : tag)
then
    insertLogical(new Q($t));
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    delete($p);
end
rule "WQ"
salience -5
when
    $q : Q($t : tag)
then
end
rule "WN"
salience -10
when
    not Q()
then
end
_finding: TMS x late-continue recon (D-258 scope question): return-Some(l) cell. Each R4 firing justifies Q then setFocus(gb)+deletes its OWN premise only; after the first firing the late-continue re-eval leaves the second activation queued and returns Some(R4) with the first Q-retraction staged in tms.deferred. Pins whether the undrained retraction is observable across the returned pick.
